steps.title: Identify the Key Signal
steps.content: ”Follow their ways” is the phrase explaining Andrew's choice. “Ways” refers to behavioral patterns or lifestyle, so “follow” must mean to copy or adopt.

steps.title: Match the Meaning
steps.content: B) Imitate directly expresses the target meaning — to copy or adopt someone's behavior. Justify (defend), mention (reference), and restore (return) all describe actions unrelated to lifestyle adoption. That matches choice B — B is correct.
